articles.author: Jamie Carter
articles.title: See A Rare ‘Blue Moon’ Rise After Sunset This Week - Forbes
articles.description: North America’s celestial highlights for the week ahead, which also apply to mid-northern latitudes in the northern hemisphere.
articles.content: May ends with a rare calendar event a second full moon in a single month, commonly known as a Blue Moon. Leading up to it, the moon passes bright stars and constellations while Venus and Jupiter cont… [+3724 chars]
